summary.headline: Strategic Shift: Community-Driven Architecture
summary.synthesis: Analysis of recent workshop inputs suggests a pivot from individual consultation to a community-led methodology to increase scalability and reduce founder burnout.
summary.prioritySignal: High burnout risk identified in current delivery model.
summary.recommendedAction: Modularize Phase 02 curriculum for asynchronous delivery.

signals.title: Scalability Ceiling
signals.observation: Nari is currently the sole delivery engine for all strategic workshops.
signals.why_it_matters: Limits growth potential to her personal availability.

decisions.title: Curriculum Decoupling
decisions.observation: Move toward a certified facilitator model.
decisions.decision_impact: Allows Nari to focus on high-level architecture while community grows.
